title: EXPRESS: Improving Participation in Digital Feedback Applications: Social Norms Appeals in Technology Management
abstract: Real-time feedback applications are reshaping employee performance feedback in operations management. Their design and implementation significantly influence employee engagement, which is a key factor in the success of technology-driven business innovations. This study investigates an implementation strategy to optimize feedback app use by employing digital nudges to encourage regular engagement. Drawing on social norms theory and cognitive load theory, we examine how message framing and users’ cognitive states affect the quantity and content features of feedback, including ratings, review length, surprise, and recognition. We conducted two randomized experiments to evaluate the effectiveness of digital nudges. Experiment 1, a field study with over 250 users of the DevelapMe app in a financial firm, tested how message framing and timing influenced cognitive load. Experiment 2, an online randomized controlled trial, explored underlying mechanisms and validated cognitive load measures. The results show that while social norms-based nudges increase feedback volume, they are associated with shorter reviews and reduced recognition and surprise. Employees experiencing lower cognitive load provided more feedback but tended to give lower ratings. Importantly, the interaction between social norms and low cognitive load resulted in higher ratings and more detailed reviews. This suggests that reducing cognitive load can enhance the positive effects of social norms on feedback quality. This study underscores the moderating role of cognitive load in the effectiveness of digital nudges and offers insights into feedback design that promotes both participation and quality. Theoretically, it contributes to research on digital feedback systems by integrating social norms and cognitive load theories to explain employee feedback behavior. Practically, it provides guidance for managers in designing real-time feedback tools that strategically use digital nudges while minimizing cognitive load, fostering a culture of continuous feedback, strengthening engagement, and improving performance management systems.
title_cn: 提升数字反馈应用中的参与度：技术管理中的社会规范诉求
abstract_cn: 实时反馈应用正在重塑运营管理中的员工绩效反馈。其设计和实施对员工参与度产生显著影响，而员工参与度是技术驱动的商业创新成功的关键因素。本研究探讨了一种实施策略，通过运用数字助推来优化反馈应用的使用，以鼓励定期参与。基于社会规范理论和认知负荷理论，我们研究了信息框架和用户认知状态如何影响反馈的数量和内容特征，包括评分、评论长度、惊讶度和认可度。我们进行了两项随机实验以评估数字助推的有效性。实验1是一项针对金融公司DevelapMe应用超过250名用户的实地研究，测试了信息框架和时机如何影响认知负荷。实验2是一项在线随机对照试验，探讨了潜在机制并验证了认知负荷的测量。结果显示，尽管基于社会规范的助推增加了反馈量，但却与较短的评论以及降低的认可和惊讶度相关。经历较低认知负荷的员工提供了更多反馈，但倾向于给出较低的评分。重要的是，社会规范与低认知负荷之间的相互作用导致了更高的评分和更详细的评论。这表明，降低认知负荷可以增强社会规范对反馈质量的积极影响。本研究强调了认知负荷在数字助推有效性中的调节作用，并提供了洞见，以促进参与和质量的反馈设计。从理论上讲，它将社会规范与认知负荷理论相结合，为数字反馈系统的研究作出了贡献，以解释员工的反馈行为。从实践上讲，它为管理者设计实时反馈工具提供了指导，这些工具在战略性使用数字助推的同时最小化认知负荷，促进持续反馈的文化，增强参与度，提高绩效管理系统的效果。

title: EXPRESS: Apparel Retail and Rental Business Models and their Sustainability Implications
abstract: In this paper, we explore the question of whether an apparel manufacturer should incorporate a renting channel into its existing business model, which currently only includes a retailing channel. We also examine how such a change would affect product quality and sustainability. We develop several game-theoretical models where an apparel manufacturer, currently selling apparel products directly to consumers, may choose to rent them out either directly or indirectly through a third-party online platform. When both retailing and renting channels are available, the manufacturer will only sell the product if rental utility or brand quality is low. Otherwise, it will sell and rent out the product simultaneously. Our findings suggest that adding a renting option to a retailing-only business model could increase the manufacturer's profit and product quality, despite potential demand cannibalization. However, the environmental impact of rental versus pure retail depends on the level of rental utility. The increase in profit and quality from incorporating renting is more significant when brand quality is higher. Additionally, this change could enhance consumer surplus and social welfare. We also analyze the effects of three common public policies on sustainability when a renting channel is added, finding that two of the policies can promote product quality. We extend our model by considering consumer heterogeneity in preferences for green consumption or discounted utility from renting, and find that our results remain robust. When examining demand cannibalization over time, we observe that product quality decisions may be influenced by the extent of cannibalization over time, while the environmental impact could worsen.
title_cn: EXPRESS：服装零售与租赁商业模式及其可持续性影响
abstract_cn: 在本文中，我们探讨了服装制造商是否应将租赁渠道纳入其现有的商业模式，当前该模式仅包含零售渠道。我们还考察了这种变化将如何影响产品质量和可持续性。我们构建了几个博弈论模型，其中服装制造商目前直接向消费者销售服装产品，可以选择直接出租或通过第三方在线平台间接出租。当零售和租赁渠道同时可用时，制造商仅在租赁效用或品牌质量较低时才会销售产品。否则，它将同时销售和出租该产品。我们的研究结果表明，在仅有零售的商业模式中添加租赁选项可能会增加制造商的利润和产品质量，尽管可能会出现需求分流。然而，租赁与纯零售的环境影响取决于租赁效用的水平。当品牌质量较高时，实施租赁带来的利润和质量提升更为显著。此外，这种变化可能会增强消费者剩余和社会福利。我们还分析了在增加租赁渠道时，三项常见公共政策对可持续性的影响，发现其中两项政策可以促进产品质量。我们通过考虑消费者对绿色消费或租赁折扣效用的偏好异质性，扩展了我们的模型，并发现我们的结果仍然具有稳健性。在考察随时间变化的需求分流时，我们观察到产品质量决策可能会受到时间内分流程度的影响，而环境影响可能会恶化。

title: EXPRESS: Sustainable Wildfire Management Meets Social Media: How Virtual Interaction Affects Wildfire Response Costs
abstract: This work addresses the operational conflicts between visibility-driven mobilization and cost efficiency in disaster management scenarios involving wildfires. Using official wildfire reporting on the social media platform Twitter (now X), we develop a temporal gravity model to extract a signal of public attention for California wildfires (2007–2021) without the “noise” of spurious content. Interpreting this signal through the lens of behavioral disaster management operations, our analysis finds a "Visibility-Efficiency Paradox". This paradox shows that while social media visibility functions as a potent mobilization signal to the general public during wildfires and is associated with greater resource deployment, it simultaneously correlates with reduced cost efficiency under high resource use loads. We identify resource saturation as a boundary condition where heuristic signals appear to shift from valuable inputs to potential stressors. These findings challenge the assumption that high visibility of responders in a wildfire emergency is a direct proxy for operational urgency and effectiveness. We propose actionable strategies, including reverse audits and decoupling, in order to help counteract salience bias; thus, highlighting the potential for algorithmic governance to align public attention with sustainable resource management.
title_cn: 可持续森林火灾管理与社交媒体的结合：虚拟互动如何影响森林火灾响应成本
abstract_cn: 本研究探讨了在涉及野火的灾害管理情境中，基于可见性驱动的动员与成本效率之间的操作冲突。通过利用社交媒体平台Twitter（现为X）上官方的野火报告，我们开发了一种时间重力模型，以提取加利福尼亚州野火（2007-2021）的公众关注信号，同时避免“假内容”带来的“噪音”。通过行为灾害管理操作的视角解读这一信号，我们的分析发现了一个“可见性-效率悖论”。该悖论显示，尽管社交媒体的可见性在野火期间作为一个强有力的动员信号，能够促进公众参与并与更大资源部署相关联，但在高资源使用负荷下，反而与成本效率降低相关联。我们确定资源饱和为一个边界条件，在此条件下，启发式信号似乎从有价值的输入转变为潜在的压力源。这些发现挑战了高可见性的响应者在野火紧急情况下直接代表操作紧迫性和有效性的假设。我们提出了一些可行的策略，包括逆审计和解耦，以帮助对抗显著性偏差，从而强调算法治理在将公众关注与可持续资源管理之间对齐的潜力。

title: EXPRESS: Production Planning with Markovian Production Relationships
abstract: We study a production planning problem with linear, nonlinear, deterministic, and/or stochastic production relationships between the production plans and actual production quantities. We start by introducing a stochastic dynamic programming formulation of the problem with a Markovian assumption on the production relationships. Under specific conditions, we establish the convexity of the optimal cost-to-go function and closed forms of optimal policies. To solve the original problem in the general case, we propose a solution framework based on sequential policy optimization and deep reinforcement learning. We discuss the theoretical properties of the framework and evaluate its numerical performance with linear and nonlinear production relationships. In the linear case, our framework performs in line with the state-of-the-art optimization-based methods with improved computational efficiency. In the nonlinear case, our framework achieves an optimality gap near 10–20%. We also illustrate that the proposed methodology can also be extended to the problem of joint production planning and scheduling.
title_cn: EXPRESS：基于马尔可夫生产关系的生产计划
abstract_cn: 我们研究了一个生产规划问题，其中生产计划与实际生产数量之间存在线性、非线性、确定性和/或随机的生产关系。首先，我们引入了该问题的随机动态规划形式，假设生产关系满足马尔可夫特性。在特定条件下，我们确立了最优成本函数的凸性以及最优策略的闭式解。为了在一般情况下求解原问题，我们提出了一种基于顺序策略优化和深度强化学习的解决框架。我们讨论了该框架的理论属性，并评估了其在具有线性和非线性生产关系情况下的数值表现。在线性情况下，我们的框架的表现与最先进的基于优化的方法一致，并具有更高的计算效率。在非线性情况下，我们的框架达到了接近10%至20%的最优性差距。我们还说明了所提方法可以扩展到联合生产规划与调度的问题。

title: Is <scp>AI</scp> an Algorithm by Any Other Name? Behavioral Reactions to <scp>AI</scp> ‐ and Model‐Based Demand Planning Algorithms
abstract: ABSTRACT With the ongoing deployment of AI algorithms, managers do not know whether existing demand planning processes account for possible differences in human behavior when using AI‐based systems in comparison to legacy model‐based systems. This study examines how human behavior may differ when performing demand forecasting tasks due to the disclosure of algorithm type (AI or model) along with associated algorithm performance (low and improving). Using signaling theory, we hypothesize that algorithm type and performance influence user forecast adjustment behavior. We find support for these predictions across two laboratory experiments and a large quasi‐natural field experiment with approximately 575,000 observations from a multinational retailer. We find no significant direct effect of algorithm type independent of performance in the lab. In contrast, in the field, users implement significantly greater adjustments for AI‐based algorithms compared to model‐based algorithms. Across both contexts, algorithm performance, whether low or improving, has a significant direct effect on user adjustments, with users adapting their behavior to the algorithm's performance. Finally, we find that in the lab and the field, users' responses to low performance are amplified when the forecasts originate from AI‐based algorithms. Our findings underscore the nuance and complexity in which users interact with AI‐based algorithms compared to model‐based algorithms and demonstrate the value of signaling theory for understanding human–AI collaboration.
topics: Ethics and Social Impacts of AI
title_cn: <scp>AI</scp>是否仅仅是另一种名称的算法？对<scp>AI</scp>及基于模型的需求规划算法的行为反应
abstract_cn: 摘要 随着人工智能算法的不断部署，管理者不确定现有的需求规划流程是否考虑到在使用基于人工智能的系统时，与传统模型系统相比，人类行为可能存在的差异。本研究考察了在进行需求预测任务时，由于算法类型（人工智能或模型）及其性能（低和改善）的披露，人类行为可能的差异。基于信号理论，我们假设算法类型和性能影响用户的预测调整行为。我们在两个实验室实验和一个包含约575,000个观察结果的大型准自然场实验中，对这些预测提供了支持，这些数据来自一家跨国零售商。我们发现，在实验室中，算法类型在独立于性能的情况下对预测调整没有显著直接影响。相比之下，在实际场景中，相对于基于模型的算法，用户对基于人工智能算法的调整显著更大。在这两种情境中，无论是低性能还是改善，算法性能对用户调整都有显著的直接影响，用户会根据算法的性能调整其行为。最后，我们发现，在实验室和实际场景中，当预测源自基于人工智能的算法时，用户对低性能的反应会被放大。我们的研究结果强调了用户与基于人工智能的算法互动时的细微差别和复杂性，并展示了信号理论在理解人类与人工智能协作中的价值。

title: Research excellence is hard to sustain: Evidence from Japan's WPI initiative
title_cn: 研究卓越性难以维持：来自日本WPI计划的证据

title: Distinguishing hares and tortoises in the field: Applicants' prediction of patent value flows
title_cn: 在野外区分野兔和龟：申请人对专利价值流的预测

title: Addressing modern slavery in business operations and supply chains through partnership engagement
abstract: Purpose The need for partnerships has been widely recognised by scholars and practitioners as a step forward to address modern slavery (MS) risks across business operations and supply chains but the rationale for engagement remains underexplored when businesses are involved. Using the context of events, this paper aims to explore the role of partnerships in addressing MS by analysing the perspectives of key actors involved. Risks of MS have been identified in events due to labour practices and reliance on agency workers within complex supply chain management (SCM), but event actors’ perception of partnerships and wider views on MS implications remain unknown. Design/methodology/approach This constructivist research uses narrative analysis to yield new perspectives on the partnership front which inform three narratives depicting partnerships as relationships, solutions or opportunities to address MS. Findings This study finds that engagement with external stakeholders is regarded proactively, reactively and even with reluctance by some actors. It concludes that the role of partnership is not consistently understood by all stakeholders involved and that interpretations of partnerships are rooted in individuals’ definitions of MS. Research limitations/implications The underrepresentation of internal stakeholders within event companies may constrain the transferability of the findings. While the value of sector specific research stands, future research should engage a broader range of internal and external stakeholders to articulate pathways for implementing partnership approaches to addressing MS. Practical implications This study highlights that practitioners should use accurate MS and human rights terminology to raise awareness, improve risk identification and strengthen organisational responses. Event-sector stakeholders and partners can move from awareness to action by embedding MS specific terminology, supplier codes of conduct, risk assessments and KPIs into partnership and supply chain governance, with lessons transferable to other high-risk service sectors. Originality/value This study offers a contribution by uncovering how fragmented understandings of MS and diverse interpretations of partnerships − shaped by whether MS is seen as a compliance issue, human rights concern or criminal offence − create conflicting motivations and barriers to effective collaboration in the events sector and its supply chains. It contributes to MS in business and SCM scholarship by providing original insight into how vague, business-friendly language obscures labour exploitation risks and limits businesses’ preparedness for relational governance and partnership engagement.
topics: Supply Chain Resilience and Risk Management
Global trade, sustainability, and social impact
title_cn: 通过合作参与解决企业运营和供应链中的现代奴役问题
abstract_cn: 目的 合作伙伴关系的需求已被学者和从业者广泛认可，作为应对现代奴隶制（MS）风险的前进一步，然而在企业参与的情况下，合作的动机仍然未被深入探讨。本文旨在通过分析相关关键参与者的观点，探讨活动背景下伙伴关系在应对现代奴隶制中的作用。由于劳动实践和对代理工人的依赖，活动中识别出了现代奴隶制风险，但活动参与者对合作伙伴关系的看法及对现代奴隶制影响的更广泛视角尚不明确。 设计/方法论 本研究采用建构主义的方法，通过叙事分析获得关于合作伙伴关系的新视角，并形成三种叙事，将合作伙伴关系描绘为关系、解决方案或机会，以应对现代奴隶制。 发现 本研究发现，外部利益相关者的参与在某些参与者看来是主动、反应性甚至是出于不情愿的。研究得出结论，参与的所有利益相关者对合作伙伴关系的理解并不一致，合作伙伴关系的理解根植于个人对现代奴隶制的定义。 研究局限性/含义 活动公司内部利益相关者的不足代表可能限制研究结果的可转移性。尽管特定行业研究的价值依然存在，未来的研究应当涵盖更广泛的内部和外部利益相关者，以阐明实施合作伙伴关系方法解决现代奴隶制的途径。 实践意义 本研究强调，实践者应使用准确的现代奴隶制和人权术语以提高意识、改善风险识别和增强组织反应能力。活动行业的利益相关者和合作伙伴可以通过将与现代奴隶制相关的术语、供应商行为准则、风险评估和关键绩效指标嵌入到合作伙伴关系和供应链治理中，从意识转向行动，这些经验教训可转移到其他高风险服务行业中。 原创性/价值 本研究通过揭示现代奴隶制和对合作伙伴关系的不同解读（这些解读受限于现代奴隶制被视为合规问题、人权关切或犯罪行为）如何造成事件行业及其供应链中有效协作的冲突动机和障碍，做出贡献。它通过提供原创性的见解，阐明模糊的、有利于商业的语言如何掩盖劳动剥削风险，限制企业为关系治理和合作伙伴参与做好准备，进一步丰富了商业和供应链管理领域的现代奴隶制研究。

title: Impact article: how do we reduce domestic servitude risk in the developed world?
abstract: Purpose This paper aims to detail the policy impact arising from a series of interlocking studies designed to reduce the risk of domestic servitude, a severe form of modern slavery, within care work conducted in private households. Design/methodology/approach Mixed methods were used including feminist participatory action research; comparative international case studies; prevalence estimation based upon respondent-driven sampling and network scale-up methods; and facilitated group problem solving techniques. Findings While this impact pathway demonstrates that it is possible to amplify the voices of marginalised communities within public policy debates, such an approach also raises questions about the ethical implications of impact work, including how to ensure that the voices of other affected communities are acknowledged. Practical implications This impact work includes the publication of modern slavery risk assessment and due diligence guidance, and a process for their local development, for commissioners and procurers of adult social care. Social implications Domestic servitude is a hidden phenomenon. Through engagement with those who deliver live-in care provision, this impact study aimed both to shed light on the risks that they face and increase their agency through direct training in research methods and community-based advocacy. Originality/value This impact paper summarises a multi-faceted research approach to a complex and urgent social problem. It highlights the role public authorities, as state procurers and commissioners of adult social care, can play in the reduction of modern slavery risk in domestic settings and extends the understanding of the role of worker voice in identifying and amplifying the views of those engaged in care work in private household settings.
topics: Global trade, sustainability, and social impact
title_cn: 影响文章：我们如何降低发达国家的家庭奴役风险？
abstract_cn: 目的 本文旨在详细阐述一系列相互关联的研究所产生的政策影响，这些研究旨在减少家庭看护工作中存在的严重形式的现代奴隶制——家庭劳役的风险。 设计/方法论 本研究采用了混合方法，包括女性主义参与性行动研究；比较国际案例研究；基于受访者驱动抽样和网络扩展方法的流行程度估计；以及促进小组问题解决的技术。 发现 虽然这一影响路径表明有可能在公共政策辩论中放大边缘化社区的声音，但这种方法也引发了关于影响工作的伦理意义的问题，包括如何确保其他受影响社区的声音被倾听。 实际意义 此项影响工作包括发布现代奴隶制风险评估和尽职调查指南，以及为成年人社会护理的委托者和采购者提供的本地开发流程。 社会意义 家庭劳役是一种隐秘现象。通过与提供入住护理服务者的互动，本次影响研究旨在揭示他们面临的风险，并通过直接的研究方法培训和社区倡导来提高他们的自主性。 创新/价值 本次影响论文总结了一种多层面的研究方法，针对复杂且紧迫的社会问题，突出了公共机构作为成年社会护理的国家采购者和委托者在降低家庭环境中现代奴隶制风险方面可以发挥的作用，并扩展了对工人声音在识别和放大那些参与私人家庭看护工作者观点中的作用的理解。

title: A Curation Approach to Identity Management: The Costs of Combining Identity Expression and Suppression
abstract: Many organizations want to increase diversity among their workforce, but employees from marginalized groups consistently face uncertainty about how to navigate their identities at work, which can lead to high turnover among these employees. To highlight the unexpected ways in which such risks can arise for employees and organizations, we investigate the intrapersonal consequences of a curation approach to navigating social identities in the workplace. Curation involves frequent identity expression (integrating an identity into the workplace, such as discussing identity-based traditions) and frequent identity suppression (concealing aspects of an identity at work, such as hiding concerns about discrimination). Given that expression and suppression both have benefits and risks, combining these behaviors into a curation approach could be seen as a socially adept and professionally beneficial solution. However, focusing on the intrapersonal experiences of employees of color, we argue that, compared to primarily expressing or primarily suppressing a minority identity, curation is more psychologically detrimental to these employees. Combining expression and suppression fosters ambivalence—conflicting thoughts about whether one’s identity is a resource or a liability—which is psychologically aversive. In two surveys and an internal meta-analysis (of the two studies in the manuscript and a supplemental study reported in supplementary online materials), curation was associated with greater ambivalence and psychological strain, which, in turn, were associated with greater turnover intentions. While our core findings emerge with employees of color, we also provide exploratory evidence that the costs of curation extend to women. Our findings regarding curation reveal a previously unrecognized well-being risk for employees from marginalized groups and a retention risk for organizations. We offer recommendations for future research and practice to address the conditions that lead employees to engage in curation.
title_cn: 身份管理的策展方法：身份表达与压抑结合的成本
abstract_cn: 许多组织希望增加其 workforce 的多样性，但来自边缘群体的员工在工作中如何处理自身身份的问题经常面临不确定性，这可能导致这些员工的高流失率。为了突出员工和组织面临此类风险的意外方式，我们研究了一种在工作场所处理社会身份的策展方法的内心后果。策展涉及频繁的身份表达（将身份融入工作场所，例如讨论与身份相关的传统）和频繁的身份压抑（隐瞒在工作中的身份某些方面，例如隐藏对歧视的担忧）。鉴于表达和压抑都有其好处和风险，将这些行为结合成一种策展方法可以视为一种社会上灵活且职业上有益的解决方案。然而，关注有色人种员工的内心体验，我们认为，与其主要表达或主要压抑少数身份相比，策展对这些员工的心理伤害更大。结合表达和压抑会导致矛盾——即对自身身份是资源还是负担产生冲突的想法——这在心理上是令人厌恶的。在两项调查和一项内部元分析（对手稿中的两项研究及补充在线材料中报告的补充研究）中，策展与更大的矛盾感和心理压力相关，这反过来又与更高的离职意向相关。虽然我们的核心发现是在有色人种员工中产生的，但我们也提供了探索性证据，表明策展的成本也扩展到女性。我们关于策展的发现揭示了一个先前未被认可的边缘群体员工的福祉风险和组织的留任风险。我们为未来的研究和实践提供了建议，以应对导致员工参与策展的条件。

title: Stories under scrutiny: How entrepreneurs and investors negotiate entrepreneurial narratives in interactional exchanges during investment pitches
title_cn: 故事的审视：创业者和投资者在投资演讲中的互动交流中如何协商创业叙事

title: Where Do Transitioning Executives Go? Exploring Demand-Side and Supply-Side Drivers of Destination Rivalry
abstract: Executive movement to close rivals can have significant implications for firm competitiveness. While prior research has provided valuable insights into the antecedents of executive search and turnover in general, the theoretical understanding of where executives go when they move remains underdeveloped. We extend research in this area by introducing the concept of destination rivalry, defined as the degree of market commonality and resource similarity between an executive’s departure firm and destination firm. We then develop a theoretical model of key demand-side and supply-side factors associated with an executive’s position in the departure firm that explains movement to a closer versus more distant rivals. We theorize that among executives moving between firms, destination rivalry will be higher when the executive possesses competition-specific human capital (e.g., via core functional experience or corporate or divisional experience at the departure firm), has a larger pay gap to the CEO, and especially when both factors are present. Empirical tests of the theoretical model using a sample of executive movements from S&P 1500 firms to other public companies between 1993 and 2023 are largely consistent with these predictions. Our findings contribute to research on executive mobility and competitive strategy by providing novel insights into factors shaping the degree of rivalry in executive moves.
title_cn: 转型高管的去向何处？探索目的地竞争的需求侧和供给侧驱动因素
abstract_cn: 高管职位流动对企业竞争力可能具有重要影响。虽然以往的研究为高管招聘和离职的前因提供了有价值的见解，但关于高管在转职时去向何方的理论理解仍然不够完善。我们通过引入“目的地竞争”这一概念来扩展该领域的研究，定义为高管离职公司与目的地公司之间的市场共性和资源相似度的程度。接着，我们构建了一个理论模型，探讨与高管在离职公司职位相关的关键需求方和供应方因素，以解释为何高管会选择更接近或更远的竞争对手。我们理论推测，在企业之间流动的高管中，当高管拥有特定的竞争人力资本（例如，通过在离职公司获得的核心职能经验或公司/部门经验），且与首席执行官的薪酬差距较大时，目的地竞争会更高，尤其当这两个因素同时存在时。对1993年至2023年间来自S&P 1500公司的高管流动样本进行的实证测试，大致与这些预测一致。我们的研究结果为高管流动性和竞争战略的研究提供了新的见解，揭示了影响高管流动竞争程度的因素。

title: Peer Effects in Corporate ESG: Evidence from Mandatory Disclosure and Philanthropic Giving
title_cn: 企业环境、社会与治理（ESG）中的同伴效应：来自强制性披露和慈善捐赠的证据

title: Revealing the Incrementalism Trap in Corporate Sustainability: The Impact of Conflicting Stakeholder Expectations in Incumbent and Startup Companies
abstract: Abstract Stakeholder engagement has become established as pivotal in corporate sustainability. Literature on stakeholder engagement in corporate sustainability has a strong grounding in normative ethics. An issue that has received less attention in this scholarship is context-sensitive responses to tensions stemming from conflicting stakeholder interests in corporate sustainability. Drawing on 65 interviews, we present an in-depth qualitative study of stakeholder tensions in both large incumbent corporations and sustainability-focussed startups actively pursuing corporate sustainability. We present a framework on the outcomes of stakeholder tensions in corporate sustainability, illustrating a potential incrementalism trap in corporate sustainability, where normative and pragmatic stakeholder expectations drive tensions, ultimately limiting sustainability impact. The findings of our study advance theorising on normative ethics and pragmatism in stakeholder engagement in corporate sustainability by grounding ethical evaluation in real stakeholder engagement practice.
title_cn: 揭示企业可持续性中的渐进主义陷阱：现有公司与初创公司中相互矛盾的利益相关者期望的影响
abstract_cn: 摘要 利益相关者参与已被确立为企业可持续发展的关键因素。关于企业可持续性中利益相关者参与的文献在规范伦理学方面基础扎实。然而，这一学术研究中较少关注的问题是，如何对源于利益相关者利益冲突而产生的紧张关系作出具有情境敏感性的反应。基于对65个访谈的分析，我们对大型传统企业和专注于可持续发展的初创企业在积极追求企业可持续发展时所面临的利益相关者紧张关系进行了深入的定性研究。我们提出了一个框架，阐明了企业可持续性中利益相关者紧张关系的结果，展示了企业可持续性中潜在的渐进主义陷阱，在这一陷阱中，规范和务实的利益相关者期望驱动紧张关系，最终限制了可持续发展的影响。我们的研究结果推动了关于企业可持续性中利益相关者参与的规范伦理学和务实主义理论的发展，通过将伦理评估扎根于真实的利益相关者参与实践中。

title: The Accuracy-Explainability Trade-off, the Right to Explanation, and the Implications for Organisations
abstract: Abstract Algorithms increasingly shape access to employment, credit, healthcare, and justice, yet the basis on which they do so is often opaque. A growing literature argues that affected individuals have a right to explanation, grounded in their interest in informed self-advocacy: the ability to understand and respond to decisions that bear on their life prospects. We examine whether this interest can sustain such a right. Explanations that serve self-advocacy must be reliable (truth-tracking) and verifiable (open to independent check). We show that in open-ended decision environments, where evaluative criteria must be discovered rather than stipulated in advance, reliability and verifiability conflict with accuracy. This trade-off arises in human decision-making and has a structural analogue in AI systems. Because requiring thick explanation would systematically reduce the quality of decisions, the self-advocacy interest cannot by itself ground a general right. Where thick explanation is nonetheless owed, it is justified by different grounds: legality, fairness, and trust. We draw out implications for how organisations should structure their obligations.
topics: Ethics and Social Impacts of AI
Artificial Intelligence in Healthcare and Education
title_cn: 准确性与可解释性权衡、解释权以及对组织的影响
abstract_cn: 摘要 算法日益影响就业、信贷、医疗和司法的获取，然而它们这样做的基础往往是模糊的。越来越多的文献认为，受影响的个人有权获得解释，这一权利基于他们对知情自我倡导的利益：理解和应对影响其生活前景的决策的能力。我们探讨这一利益是否能够支撑这样的权利。服务于自我倡导的解释必须是可靠的（追踪事实的）和可验证的（开放给独立检查）。我们表明，在开放式决策环境中，评估标准必须被发现而不是提前规定，可靠性和可验证性与准确性之间存在冲突。这一权衡在人的决策中出现，并在人工智能系统中具有结构性的类似特征。因为要求深入的解释将系统性地降低决策的质量，自我倡导的利益本身不能作为一般权利的基础。尽管如此，当深入的解释仍然是必要的时，它是基于其他基础而成立的：合法性、公平性和信任。我们提出了对组织如何构建其义务的启示。

title: When Benefits Backfire: The Impact of Social Insurance Contributions on Product Quality Compliance
title_cn: 当福利适得其反：社会保险缴费对产品质量合规性的影响

title: How policy implementation impacts employee suffering at work: An exploration of medical leaves of absence.
abstract: Existing work offers rich theory on how work-life policies increase autonomy and balance and reduce work-life conflict. However, in moments when life is not merely imbalanced but severely upended, such as during times of severe illness or injury, this focus on balance and autonomy may be less relevant. We explore these moments of suffering by examining an often-overlooked work-life policy: medical leaves of absence. Through a qualitative grounded theory approach, we draw on the perspectives of 48 individuals (leave-takers and leave coordinators) to offer a comprehensive understanding of how medical leave policy implementation influences employee suffering at work. We first shed light on the elements of health-related suffering in the workplace and then introduce a healing-centered implementation approach. This dedicated examination of medical leave expands theoretical conversations by situating medical leave under a distinct category of policies, suffering-related policies. For these policies, suffering is the driver of policy use, and healing is a critical outcome for determining policy effectiveness. We also build a specific framework for concretely understanding the multidimensional nature of suffering in the workplace, which enables us to illuminate more precise implementation techniques that explicitly address each of the four elements of suffering in ways that existing constructs do not. Finally, we offer recommendations for how policy is written and implemented: offering paid medical leave, separating family and medical leave, eliminating the 1-year eligibility period, employing leave coordinators, cross-training employees to prepare for sudden outages, and offering additional suffering-related policies. (PsycInfo Database Record (c) 2026 APA, all rights reserved).
title_cn: 政策实施如何影响员工在工作中的痛苦：对医疗请假的探讨。
abstract_cn: 现有研究提供了丰富的理论，阐述了工作与生活政策如何增加自主性和平衡，并减少工作与生活的冲突。然而，在生活不只是失衡而是受到严重冲击的时刻，例如在严重疾病或受伤期间，这种对平衡和自主性的关注可能就不那么相关了。我们通过研究一个常被忽视的工作与生活政策——医疗休假，来探讨这些痛苦的时刻。采用定性扎根理论的方法，我们依靠48名个人（请假者和请假协调员）的观点，全面理解医疗休假政策的实施如何影响员工在工作中的痛苦。我们首先揭示了与健康相关的工作场所痛苦的元素，然后提出了一种以治愈为中心的实施方法。对医疗休假的专门研究扩展了理论讨论，通过将医疗休假置于一个独特的政策类别——与痛苦相关的政策之下。在这些政策中，痛苦是政策使用的驱动力，治愈则是评估政策有效性的关键结果。我们还建立了一个特定框架，以具体了解工作场所痛苦的多维特性，使我们能够阐明更精准的实施技术，以明确的方式解决现有构建未能处理的四个痛苦元素。最后，我们提出了关于政策编写和实施的建议：提供带薪医疗假，区分家庭假和医疗假，取消一年的资格期限，聘用休假协调员，交叉培训员工以应对突发缺勤，以及提供额外的与痛苦相关的政策。（PsycInfo数据库记录（c）2026 APA，版权所有）
